name: Adval Tech
message: The Adval Tech Group, which is listed on the Swiss Stock Exchange, operates in the technology sectors of stamping and forming and injection molding. In stamping and forming technology, we use tools manufactured in-house to produce parts or components and also combine these into subassemblies where required. In injection molding technology, we manufacture molds for third parties and for in-house production of plastic components. The group's AWM, FOBOHA, Omni, Styner+Bienz, QSCH and Teuscher brands are technological leaders in their respective target markets and have an excellent reputation.
